jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Droom - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Droom invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Droom:
Droom is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
